query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS amendments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  proposed_by INT NOT NULL,
  proposed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  voting_ends_at DATETIME NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('voting', 'passed', 'rejected', 'expired') DEFAULT 'voting',
  required_majority INT DEFAULT 60,
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS amendment_votes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  amendment_id INT NOT NULL,
  voter_id INT NOT NULL,
  voter_name VARCHAR(255),
  vote ENUM('approve', 'reject', 'abstain') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  voted_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_amendment (amendment_id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (amendment_id, voter_id)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  proposed_by INT NOT NULL,
  proposed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  voting_ends_at DATETIME NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('voting', 'passed', 'rejected', 'expired') DEFAULT 'voting',
  required_majority INT DEFAULT 60,
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS amendment_votes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  amendment_id INT NOT NULL,
  voter_id INT NOT NULL,
  voter_name VARCHAR(255),
  vote ENUM('approve', 'reject', 'abstain') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  voted_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_amendment (amendment_id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (amendment_id, voter_id)
);
